absorption: BID absorption at VAL. Negative delta is failing to push the price lower, indicating passive buyers are absorbing the selling pressure.
dom_observation: Sellers are active but price is holding at VAL. Bids are present below, while significant offers are stacked higher up around 60800-60870.
reasoning: Fiyat, kilit destek seviyesi olan VAL'de negatif deltaya ragmen dusmeyi basaramiyor, bu da guclu pasif alici absorpsiyonunu gosteriyor.
